scripts.codegen: orval --config ./orval.config.ts && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),p='../api-zod/src/index.ts';fs.writeFileSync(p,fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8').replace(/export (?:type )?\\* from '.\/generated\/types';/,'// types re-export removed: conflicts with same-named Zod schemas in generated/api'))" && pnpm -w run typecheck:libs
